title: Power glove
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Power gloves''' were a type of [[glove]].<ref name="BOSSK">{{StoryCite|story=The Prize Pelt: The Tale of Bossk|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}}</ref><ref name="ECLIPSE">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''</ref>

Power gloves were a type of thin, energized gloves used by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] in hand-to-hand combat, usually while restraining prisoners.<ref name="BOSSK" /> A [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] using a pair was capable of physically manhandling an uncooperative [[Trandoshan]] prisoner, as was the case for [[Bossk'wassak'Cradossk|Bossk]].<ref name="BOSSK" />

In [[Hapan|Hapes]] culture, power gloves were worn in conjunction with other armor pieces as standard attire in [[honor duel]]s.<ref name="ECLIPSE" /> These energized gloves were capable of severely shocking an opponent as well as breaking bones; when a blow landed it sounded like the muffled report of a [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]], with the force generated being enough to send an adult human male backward several meters.<ref name="ECLIPSE" />

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=The Prize Pelt: The Tale of Bossk|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
